type_rationale: Repo with intentionally verbose labels to test truncation behaviour.
decomposition_strategy: Each pillar deliberately has a label longer than the column width.
scratch_outline: Roof label is short; only pillar labels overflow.
mece_check: Pillars cover four concerns at the same abstraction level.
title: wide-labels
notes_on_fit: Truncation exercises the renderer's column-width math.
